prompt:
Reference image role: the home page prototype defines our brand visual DNA — dark ink-green palette, moonlit tree-cave sanctuary, round paper moon window, stone stairs, warm hanging lanterns, mossy roots, drifting firefly cyan particles, restrained Eastern xianxia mood. PRESERVE this DNA exactly. The composition layout (left dark text region + right tree-cave with stairs and round window) must be the SAME as the prototype.

Create a wide hero background for the top of the "夕丰木" homepage. 16:9 wide format, 2880x1620 aspirational quality.

Composition (strict):
- Right 60%: A huge tree-cave interior opening upward. Stone stairs rise from foreground toward a glowing round paper moon-window deep inside the cave. Two warm-glowing lanterns hang from the left arch of the cave. Mossy vines and twisted ancient tree roots frame the cave mouth. Faint firefly glows scattered.
- Left 40%: A naturally dark, atmospheric, mostly-empty region (deep ink-green vignette with soft mist) — this is where headline text, subtitle, and CTA buttons will be placed by HTML. Leave it visually quiet but with some root tendrils and one or two fireflies for atmosphere. NO text, NO buttons, NO cards in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern warm #ddb87a, moon glow #b8d4e0, firefly #9CF0BD, gold trim #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, faces, characters, text, browser chrome, UI elements, navigation bars, hanging signs with words, oversaturated, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, low-poly, cartoonish.
